testcase.name: traceIdFromXRequestIdAppearsInLogLine
testcase.system-out: 15:29:46.725 [testcontainers-lifecycle-0] INFO tc.testcontainers/ryuk:0.12.0 - Creating container for image: testcontainers/ryuk:0.12.0 15:29:46.852 [testcontainers-lifecycle-0] INFO tc.testcontainers/ryuk:0.12.0 - STDERR: level=info ts=2026-05-11T15:29:53.814515175Z caller=worker.go:210 component=querier msg="adding connection" addr=127.0.0.1:9095 15:29:55.659 [docker-java-stream-964983675] INFO tc.loki - STDERR: level=info ts=2026-05-11T15:29:55.62584568Z caller=compactor.go:489 msg="this instance has been chosen to run the compactor, starting compactor" 15:29:55.659 [docker-java-stream-964983675] INFO tc.loki - STDERR: level=info ts=2026-05-11T15:29:55.625912745Z caller=compactor.go:518 msg="waiting 10m0s for ring to stay stable and previous compactions to finish before starting compactor" 15:30:00.859 [docker-java-stream-964983675] INFO tc.loki - STDERR: level=info ts=2026-05-11T15:30:00.815005763Z caller=frontend_scheduler_worker.go:106 msg="adding connection to scheduler" addr=127.0.0.1:9095 15:30:06.757 [testcontainers-lifecycle-0] INFO tc.grafana/loki:3.0.0 - Container grafana/loki:3.0.0 started in PT19.14389196S 15:30:06.759 [testcontainers-lifecycle-1] INFO t.o.104.0 - Creating container for image: otel/opentelemetry-collector-contrib:0.104.0 15:30:06.836 [testcontainers-lifecycle-1] INFO t.o.104.0 - Container otel/opentelemetry-collector-contrib:0.104.0 is starting: 2ea1288829710e5eabb1a1bd5137c2356013e6fcffd6b604879b2975026a3fb3 15:30:07.781 [docker-java-stream--554416750] INFO tc.collector - STDERR: 2026-05-11T15:30:07.780Z info service@v0.104.0/service.go:115 Setting up own telemetry... 15:30:07.782 [docker-java-stream--554416750] INFO tc.collector - STDERR: 2026-05-11T15:30:07.781Z info service@v0.104.0/telemetry.go:96 Serving metrics {"address": ":8888", "level": "Normal"} 15:30:07.782 [docker-java-stream--554416750] INFO tc.collector - STDERR: 2026-05-11T15:30:07.781Z info lokiexporter@v0.104.0/exporter.go:43 using the new Loki exporter {"kind": "exporter", "data_type": "logs", "name": "loki"} 15:30:07.782 [docker-java-stream--554416750] INFO tc.collector - STDERR: 2026-05-11T15:30:07.782Z info service@v0.104.0/service.go:193 Starting otelcol-contrib... {"Version": "0.104.0", "NumCPU": 14} 15:30:07.783 [docker-java-stream--554416750] INFO tc.collector - STDERR: 2026-05-11T15:30:07.782Z info extensions/extensions.go:34 Starting extensions... 15:30:07.783 [docker-java-stream--554416750] INFO tc.collector - STDERR: 2026-05-11T15:30:07.782Z info otlpreceiver@v0.104.0/otlp.go:102 Starting GRPC server {"kind": "receiver", "name": "otlp", "data_type": "logs", "endpoint": "0.0.0.0:4317"} 15:30:07.815 [docker-java-stream--554416750] INFO tc.collector - STDERR: 2026-05-11T15:30:07.814Z info service@v0.104.0/service.go:219 Everything is ready. Begin running and processing data. 15:30:07.816 [testcontainers-lifecycle-1] INFO t.o.104.0 - Container otel/opentelemetry-collector-contrib:0.104.0 started in PT1.056976541S 15:30:08.016 [main] INFO i.g.r.otellogs.OtelLogsReporter - OTel logs reporter started — exporting to http://localhost:4317

testcase.name: traceparentHeaderSetsTraceContext
testcase.system-out: 15:30:10.259 [docker-java-stream-964983675] INFO tc.loki - STDERR: level=info ts=2026-05-11T15:30:10.206385063Z caller=roundtrip.go:289 org_id=fake traceID=612c88295dc1843c msg="executing query" type=range query="{job=\"gravitee/gravitee-otel-logs\"} |= \"550e8400\"" start=2026-05-11T15:28:10.171Z end=2026-05-11T15:30:15.171Z start_delta=2m0.0353826s end_delta=-4.964617326s length=2m5s step=1000 query_hash=455623281 15:30:10.259 [docker-java-stream-964983675] INFO tc.loki - testcase.name: endpointStatusDownAppearsInLoki
